subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who knoweth His own Self at all times and hath sent down verses at morn and eventide. Verily, he that hath heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی یعرف نفسه فی کل الاحیان و نزل الایات فی الغدو و الاصال ان الذی سمع
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @living waters; water of life, @prophecy and fulfillment, @Manifestation of God as sun, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
